title: I Am Error
creator: Nathan Altice
description: A detailed platform study of the Famicom and NES, including hardware, controllers, cartridges, development practices, and design conventions.
useful: For readers who want technical history to remain connected to software design and culture.
audience: Advanced readers researching the NES, platform studies, or the material history of game design.
learning: Map NES hardware to software conventions
Understand cartridges, controllers, and development practices
Connect platform architecture with game aesthetics and culture
